fileUploader.helper: You can also use the buttons below to choose files or a folder

templatePicker.noExtraSettings: This template does not need extra settings.

html-required-elements.name: Required HTML elements
html-required-elements.description: Check whether the page contains required HTML elements such as nav, header, footer, main, and h1.

selectors.label: CSS selectors to check (one per line)

html-element-count.name: HTML element counts
html-element-count.description: Check whether specific element counts meet expectations, such as li, img, and a.

html-form-elements.name: Form structure
html-form-elements.description: Check whether the page includes a complete form structure.

inputNames.label: Required input name attributes (one per line)

styling-property-check.name: CSS property checks
styling-property-check.description: Check whether elements use specific CSS property values.

rules.label: Rules (one per line: selector | property | expected value)
rules.placeholder:
nav | display | flex
h1 | font-size | 24px
body | margin | 0px

styling-responsive.name: Responsive checks
styling-responsive.description: Check visibility or styling at different viewport widths.

rules.label: Rules (one per line: width | selector | visible/hidden)

styling-no-default.name: Avoid browser defaults
styling-no-default.description: Check whether the page removes default styles and applies custom fonts or backgrounds.

bodyNoMargin.label: Check body has no default margin (1=yes)

hasBackground.label: Check body has a custom background color (1=yes)

func-click-event.name: Button click interaction
func-click-event.description: Click a button and verify the expected UI change appears.

func-form-submit.name: Form submission validation
func-form-submit.description: Fill form fields, submit, and verify the result or validation state.

fields.label: Fields to fill (one per line: selector | value)

successText.label: Success text (leave blank to only check visibility)

func-localstorage.name: LocalStorage persistence
func-localstorage.description: Check whether the app stores data correctly in localStorage after interaction.

page-title.name: Page title
page-title.description: Check whether the page title contains the expected text.

page-meta.name: Meta tags
page-meta.description: Check whether viewport, charset, and description meta tags are configured properly.

page-multi-page.name: Multi-page navigation
page-multi-page.description: Check whether the site includes multiple pages and whether links navigate correctly.

links.label: Paths to check (one per line: path | expected title or selector)

page-no-console-errors.name: No console errors
page-no-console-errors.description: Verify that the page loads without JavaScript console errors.

page-accessibility.name: Basic accessibility
page-accessibility.description: Check image alt text, semantic tags, heading order, and other basic accessibility items.

screenshot-capture.name: Screenshot capture
screenshot-capture.description: Capture full-page screenshots after loading the page.

react-component-render.name: React render checks
react-component-render.description: Check whether React components render correctly and whether props are displayed.

selectors.label: Selectors to check (one per line: selector | expected text)

react-state-interaction.name: React state interaction
react-state-interaction.description: Check React state behavior such as counters, toggles, and lists.

home.title: Home
home.heroDescription: A frontend assignment submission and auto-grading platform. Upload your HTML / CSS / JS or React work, and the system runs Playwright tests automatically to produce scores, screenshots, and grading reports.
home.featureUploadDesc: Drag and drop assignments or pick files manually, then the system queues and runs tests right away.
home.featureScreenshotDesc: Playwright captures screenshots in multiple sizes so design output is easy to compare.
home.featureScoreDesc: Reports and error details stay easy to scan, helping students fix issues faster.
home.ctaDescription: Manage class setup, test templates, and grading feedback in one place.

login.title: Log in
login.hint: Self-service sign-up is disabled. Contact an administrator to get an account.

profile.title: Profile
profile.passwordUpdateFailed: Password update failed. Check whether the current password is correct.

classes.title: Classes
classes.emptyStudent: You have not joined any classes yet
classes.emptyStaff: No classes have been created yet

assignmentForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Write the assignment description in Markdown...
assignmentForm.scriptHelp: Generate code from a template above or write it manually. Supports replace apply and append apply.

assignmentEdit.title: Edit assignment
assignmentEdit.deleteRecords: Delete all current submissions and score records
assignmentEdit.deleteHelp: Choosing delete clears the current submissions, runs, and artifacts for this assignment.

assignmentDetail.uploadFailedTooManyFiles: Submission failed: too many files. Make sure build output such as node_modules and dist is excluded, then try again.
assignmentDetail.hiddenDuplicates: Duplicate submissions are hidden. Showing only each student's latest submission.

submissionDetail.downloadFailed: Download failed. Please try again later.
submissionDetail.title: Submission details
submissionDetail.rejudgeFailed: Rejudge failed. Please try again later.
submissionDetail.timeoutHint: This grading run timed out inside the container. Usually npm install/build took too long or the app got stuck.

classDetail.searchPlaceholder: Search by username or display name...

admin.title: Admin
admin.bulkImportHelp: One user per line in this format: username,password,displayName,role(student/teacher/admin)
